title: Effect pinger
description: Mod that plays a ping effect when an effect is close to running out.
body:
Made this mod to remind me to repot when playing pvp gamemodes. It plays a sound effect of your choice when an effect is close to running out of time, meaning you will always have effects strength or invisibility. 

![config screen :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cd6fb2129410019673da2944713643ce7576c95.jpeg)
